ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MORGAN STANLEY DW INC., JOHN MORAN, PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD & ENTER JUDGMNT THEREON. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT-NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
ORDER GRANTING THE ARBITRATION AWARD ISSUED ON MARCH 25,2004.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN STANLEY DW INC. MORAN, JOHN JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER, PATSY Y ALL CLAIMS BY PATSY Y.BUTLER,INCLUDING PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE DISMISSED.ALL OTHER RELIEF NOT EXPRESSLY GRANTED IS DENIED.(SEE SCANNED DCOUMENTS FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY DW INC. MORAN, JOHN JOSEPH RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT BUTLER, PATSY Y (ALL CLAIMS BY RESPONDENT INCLUDING THE CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE DISMISSED. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH REGARDING FURTHER ARBITRATION RULINGS) SEE SCANNED DOC
